🎵
DAVOOO
Beat Producer · Sound Designer · Ethiopia 🇪🇹

I'm Dawit Yisma, known in the music world as DAVOOO — a beat producer and sound designer based in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. I've been crafting beats since I first heard the raw energy of trap and afrobeats collide, and I've never stopped.

My sound is built on the intersection of traditional Ethiopian melodies and modern trap, afrobeats, and drill production. Every beat I make carries a story — something that moves people, something that pushes artists to their next level.

I work with artists across Ethiopia and beyond, providing them with the sonic foundation they need to bring their vision to life. Whether you need something dark and hard, smooth and melodic, or straight fire — I've got you covered.

When I'm not in the studio, I'm studying the craft, listening to the greats, and pushing my sound forward. This is not just a side hustle — this is my life's work.

Trap Afrobeats Drill Melodic 808s Addis Ababa Ethiopia

What I Do

Skills & Services

🎹

Beat Production

Full beats from scratch — melody, drums, bass, mix. Every style from dark trap to afrobeats.

🎚️

Mixing & Mastering

Professional mix and master for your records. Radio-ready sound, competitive loudness.

🎸

Custom Beats

Need something made specifically for you? Hit me up and I'll create exactly what you're looking for.

📦

Sample Packs

Royalty-free loops, one-shots, and full kits. Built for producers who want quality sounds fast.

Ready to Work?

Let's Create

Whether you're buying a beat, looking for a custom order, or just want to connect — I'm always open to new collaborations.
